paths.title: Full-Stack Developer (MERN)
paths.desc: Learn MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js end-to-end. Build real-world applications, understand backend APIs, authentication, database modeling, React state management, deployment, and modern full-stack architecture practices.

modules.title: Web Requests
modules.desc: Learn how HTTP requests work and how applications communicate with backends.

modules.title: Introduction to Web Applications
modules.desc: Learn how web applications work from a security and full-stack perspective.

modules.title: Using Web Proxies
modules.desc: Learn Burp Suite and OWASP ZAP for inspecting web requests.

paths.title: Full-Stack Developer (MEAN)
paths.desc: Master Angular, Express, Node.js, MongoDB, and scalable frontend architecture.

paths.title: Python Full-Stack Developer
paths.desc: Learn Django/Flask, ORM, REST APIs, authentication, HTML templating, and deployment.

modules.title: Django Basics
modules.desc: Learn models, views, templates, and routing inside Django.

paths.title: Java Full-Stack Developer
paths.desc: Learn Spring Boot, Microservices, Hibernate, SQL, APIs, and frontend frameworks.

paths.title: DevOps Engineer
paths.desc: Master CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, AWS, Terraform, and Linux automation.
